message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Sequence Diagram: Get post by url

participant "Client" as Client
participant "Frontend" as Frontend
participant "Backend" as Backend

activate Client
activate Frontend
activate Backend

Client -> Frontend : 1 Get post by url
Frontend -> Backend : 2 GET: /post/{id}
Backend --> Frontend : 3 post
Frontend --> Client : 4 show created post page

deactivate Client
deactivate Frontend
deactivate Backend

@enduml
```
